name: koishi-plugin-chatluna-relay
description: Give a ChatLuna character bot one guarded tool to proactively DM a whitelisted friend on a topic (trigger / recipient / friend-only / rate-limit / anti-loop guards).
author: 妖祀

description.zh: 给 ChatLuna 角色 bot 注册一个受护栏保护的工具：触发白名单里的人可在对话中让 bot 就某话题主动私信白名单好友（bot 发自己组织的开场白，之后由 chatluna 私聊默认行为自然接续）。护栏：触发权白名单 / 收件人白名单 / 仅好友 / 限流 / 可选防回环。所有面向模型的话术均可在控制台改写，适配任意角色。
description.en: Registers one guard-protected ChatLuna tool: a whitelisted user can, in conversation, have the character bot proactively DM a whitelisted friend about a topic. The bot sends its own opener; the ensuing chat is chatluna's normal private-chat behaviour. Guards: trigger whitelist / recipient whitelist / friend-only / rate-limit / optional anti-loop. All model-facing wording is editable in the console for any character.
